data.name: Witch’s Lewd Curse
data.detailed_description:
Witch’s Lewd Curse is an adult, explicit visual novel set in a mystical realm brimming with intrigue, romance, and monster girls. You play as an ordinary man who’s been cursed by the powerful Witch, Velina, forcing you to collect lewd energy in order to break free. To lift the soul-binding spell, you’ll explore diverse regions, build intimate bonds, and indulge in sensual encounters with an array of bewitching monster girls—all while trying to uncover Velina’s hidden motives.

Key Features:

  • Romance & Seduction: Form deep connections with monster girls, each with unique personalities, difficulty levels, and explicit storylines.

  • Sandbox Exploration: Travel through enchanted forests, eerie swamps, and mysterious ruins—unlock new areas as you increase your intimacy with each companion.

  • Daily Cycle & Progression: Manage your time across morning, afternoon, evening, and night to explore, complete quests, and strengthen relationships.

  • Lewd Energy Collection: Engage in erotic encounters to gather magical energy, filling Velina’s artifact to loosen her curse.

  • Branching Narrative: Multiple routes, choices, and outcomes—experience the story your way, then revisit content to discover new scenes.

  • Adult Content: Immerse yourself in a raw, uncensored world that blends fantasy and lust. All characters featured are consenting adults aged 18+.

Embrace your fate or dare to defy it—either way, you’ll have to satisfy the realm’s most alluring inhabitants if you ever hope to break free of the Witch’s Lewd Curse.

data.short_description: An adult fantasy visual novel where you’re cursed by a powerful Witch and must gather lewd energy from seductive monster girls to break free. Explore a magical realm, build intimate relationships, and uncover the dark secrets behind Witch’s Lewd Curse.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended
